title: Fed nominee Warsh filings detail vast wealth, far exceeding past chairs
summary: Kevin Warsh, the nominee to lead the Federal Reserve, has disclosed financial holdings significantly exceeding those of all previous Fed chairs, according to newly released documents. His vast wealth raises questions about potential conflicts of interest as he prepares for the central bank's top leadership role.
content: Kevin Warsh, nominee to lead the Federal Reserve, detailed his holdings in newly released financial disclosures.

zh.title: 美联储提名人沃什披露文件显示财富远超以往主席
zh.summary: 根据最近公布的文件，被提名担任美联储主席的凯文·沃什披露的金融资产远超所有前任主席。他的巨大财富引发了对潜在利益冲突的担忧，因为他准备接任美联储最高领导职位。

title: Amazon to buy Globalstar to bolster Leo satellite business
summary: Amazon announced plans to acquire Globalstar to bolster its low-earth orbit satellite internet business and compete directly with SpaceX's Starlink. The acquisition strengthens Amazon's position in the emerging satellite broadband market.
content: Amazon said it would acquire Globalstar, giving its nascent satellite internet business a boost as it vies to compete with Elon Musk's SpaceX.

zh.title: 亚马逊收购Globalstar以加强近地轨道卫星业务
zh.summary: 亚马逊宣布计划收购Globalstar，以加强其近地轨道卫星互联网业务，并直接与SpaceX的Starlink竞争。此次收购加强了亚马逊在新兴卫星宽带市场中的地位。

title: JPMorgan tops estimates on Wall Street results, Dimon flags 'increasingly complex' economic risks
summary: JPMorgan Chase reported first-quarter earnings that exceeded Wall Street estimates, though CEO Jamie Dimon cautioned about mounting economic risks across global markets. The bank's results suggest financial resilience despite geopolitical tensions and market volatility.
content: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon called the economy resilient, but pointed to an "increasingly complex set of risks" across global markets.

zh.title: 摩根大通超出华尔街预期，迪蒙警示"日益复杂"的经济风险
zh.summary: 摩根大通公布的第一季度收益超出华尔街预期，但首席执行官杰米·迪蒙对全球市场日益增加的经济风险提出警告。该银行的业绩表明，尽管存在地缘政治紧张局势和市场波动，但其财务韧性仍然很强。

title: Wells Fargo sees little change in guidance despite spike in oil prices
summary: Wells Fargo, the fourth-largest U.S. lender, maintained its 2026 guidance for net interest income and noninterest expense despite recent spikes in oil prices. The bank's unchanged outlook suggests confidence in stable economic conditions ahead.
content: The fourth-largest lender in the U.S. said its outlook for net interest income and noninterest expense in 2026 has remained unchanged

zh.title: 尽管油价飙升，富国银行基本维持指导意见不变
zh.summary: 美国第四大放贷机构富国银行尽管近期油价大幅上涨，仍维持其2026年净利息收入和非利息支出的指导意见。该银行不变的前景展望表明其对未来经济稳定状况的信心。

title: Citigroup beats estimates, boosted by gains in fixed income
summary: Citigroup reported its strongest quarterly revenue in a decade and a 56% year-over-year increase in earnings per share, driven primarily by gains in fixed income trading. The results demonstrate the bank's recovery and resilience in challenging market conditions.
content: Citigroup reported its best quarterly revenue in a decade and a 56% year-over-year jump in earnings per share.

zh.title: 花旗集团超越预期，由固定收益交易推动
zh.summary: 花旗集团报告称其季度收入创十年新高，每股收益同比增长56%，主要由固定收益交易收益驱动。这些成果展示了该银行在挑战性市场条件下的复苏和韧性。

title: The top 10 large U.S. cities for recent college graduates in 2026, according to new report—3 are in Texas
summary: A new Glassdoor and Redfin report identifies the top 10 large U.S. cities for recent college graduates, with three Texas cities making the list, while traditional employment hubs New York City and Los Angeles notably did not rank. The findings suggest shifting migration patterns among young professionals.
content: New York City and LA didn't make the list, published by Glassdoor and Redfin on April 14.

zh.title: 根据新报告，2026年最适合应届大学毕业生的美国十大城市——其中3个在德州
zh.summary: 一份由Glassdoor和Redfin联合发布的新报告确定了最适合应届大学毕业生的美国十大城市，其中三个德州城市上榜，而传统就业中心纽约市和洛杉矶明显未上榜。这一发现表明年轻专业人士的迁移模式正在发生变化。

title: The Iran war could cost the American taxpayer $1 trillion, says Harvard academic
summary: A Harvard academic estimates that a potential conflict with Iran could cost American taxpayers up to $1 trillion as diplomatic efforts to reach a lasting settlement have stalled. The projection significantly exceeds earlier cost estimates for military intervention.
content: As efforts to reach a lasting settlement have so far proved unsuccessful, one Harvard academic estimates the total could end up far higher than was promised.

zh.title: 哈佛学者称伊朗战争可能让美国纳税人支付1万亿美元
zh.summary: 哈佛学者估计，与伊朗可能发生的冲突可能导致美国纳税人支付高达1万亿美元，因为达成持久和平协议的外交努力已经陷入停滞。该预测大大超过了之前对军事干预成本的估计。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Novo Nordisk, JPMorgan Chase, United Airlines & more
summary: Multiple stocks including Novo Nordisk, JPMorgan Chase, and United Airlines are experiencing significant moves in premarket trading, indicating investor sentiment ahead of the regular trading session.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前波动最大的股票：诺和诺德、摩根大通、美联航等
zh.summary: 包括诺和诺德、摩根大通和美联航在内的多只股票在盘前交易中经历显著波动，表明投资者对常规交易时段的情绪。

title: Fuel protesters in tractors disrupt Belfast traffic
summary: Protesters driving tractors are disrupting traffic in Belfast to demonstrate against soaring energy prices, forcing drivers to allow extra travel time through affected areas. The convoy highlights growing frustration with rising fuel and electricity costs.
content: Drivers are being told to allow extra time due to a slow-moving convoy of demonstrators unhappy with soaring energy prices.

zh.title: 拖拉机上的燃油抗议者扰乱贝尔法斯特交通
zh.summary: 驾驶拖拉机的抗议者通过扰乱贝尔法斯特交通来抗议飙升的能源价格，迫使驾驶者在受影响地区留出额外的通行时间。车队凸显了对燃料和电力成本上升日益增长的不满。

title: J&J's first-quarter profit beats estimates even as Stelara sales disappoint
summary: Johnson & Johnson exceeded first-quarter profit expectations despite declining sales of its blockbuster autoimmune drug Stelara, with strong performance from cancer drug Darzalex and psoriasis treatment Tremfya offsetting the loss. The results underscore J&J's diversified drug portfolio.
content: Strong demand for cancer drug Darzalex and psoriasis treatment Tremfya more ​than offset a steep falloff in ​sales of its blockbuster ​autoimmune drug Stelara.

zh.title: 强生第一季度利润超预期，但史特拉莎销售令人失望
zh.summary: 强生公司第一季度利润超越预期，尽管其重磅自身免疫病药物史特拉莎销售额下滑，但癌症药物达拉生和银屑病治疗药物特瑞芬亚的强劲表现抵消了这一损失。这些结果强调了强生多样化的药物组合。

title: Households could get free electricity for doing washing on sunny weekends
summary: UK energy providers will gain the ability to offer free or discounted electricity to households during sunny weekends when renewable energy supply exceeds demand. The initiative aims to incentivize energy consumption during periods of peak renewable generation.
content: Providers will be able to encourage people to use energy when "weather conditions result in excess supply".

zh.title: 家庭可在晴天周末洗衣时获得免费电力
zh.summary: 英国能源提供商将有能力在晴天周末向家庭提供免费或折扣电力，此时可再生能源供应超过需求。该计划旨在鼓励在可再生能源生成高峰期间的能源消费。

title: General Motors is trading at attractive levels after pullback, Deutsche Bank says
summary: Deutsche Bank views General Motors shares as trading at attractive valuations following a more than 2% decline since the Iran conflict began. The pullback has been driven by investor concerns about rising shipping costs and potential supply chain disruptions.
content: Shares have edged down more than 2% since the Iran war began, fueled by concerns about rising shipping costs and potential supply shocks.

zh.title: 德意志银行表示通用汽车在回调后的交易价格具有吸引力
zh.summary: 德意志银行认为通用汽车股票在伊朗冲突开始后下跌超过2%，现在的交易价格具有吸引力。这次回调是由投资者对运费上升和潜在供应链中断的担忧推动的。

title: BlackRock quarterly profit rises on active ETFs and performance fees
summary: BlackRock's quarterly profit rose as growth in active exchange-traded funds and performance fees offset challenges in passive investing. Assets under management climbed to $13.89 trillion, up from $11.58 trillion a year earlier.
content: Total assets under management at the world's largest asset manager came in at $13.89 trillion, up from $11.58 trillion in the year-ago period.

zh.title: 贝莱德季度利润因主动交易所交易基金和业绩费增长而上升
zh.summary: 贝莱德季度利润因主动交易所交易基金和业绩费的增长而上升，这抵消了被动投资面临的挑战。管理资产增至13.89万亿美元，较一年前的11.58万亿美元有所增长。

title: House Republican campaign arm touts tax cuts in new 2026 election ad
summary: The House Republican campaign arm is highlighting tax cuts passed in previous legislation in a new campaign advertisement as Republicans defend their narrow House majority in 2026 elections. The messaging strategy reflects the party's emphasis on tax policy achievements.
content: Republicans are trying to defend a razor-thin majority in the House and are running on tax policies passed last year.

zh.title: 众议院共和党竞选机构在新的2026年选举广告中宣传减税政策
zh.summary: 众议院共和党竞选机构在新的竞选广告中宣传之前立法通过的减税政策，以便共和党在2026年选举中保卫他们微弱的众议院多数席位。这一信息策略反映了该党对税收政策成就的重视。

title: ‘It is their fault’: My condo board forgot to bill for storage fees. Must I pay retroactively?
summary: A condo resident questions their financial obligation to retroactively pay seven to eight months of storage fees after the condo board failed to bill for the charges. The dispute raises questions about condo governance and resident liability for administrative oversights.
content: “They now intend to bill us for seven to eight months of storage fees.”

zh.title: "这是他们的错"：我的公寓委员会忘记收取存储费。我必须追溯支付吗？
zh.summary: 一位公寓居民质疑自己是否有义务追溯支付七到八个月的存储费，因为公寓委员会未能向这些费用计费。这一纠纷引发了关于公寓治理和居民对行政疏漏责任的问题。

title: Oil falls as Vance comments raise hopes for a diplomatic resolution to Mideast conflict
summary: U.S. VP JD Vance indicated Tehran holds the next steps in Iran-U.S. peace efforts, boosting hopes for diplomatic resolution and causing oil prices to decline. This matters as Middle East tensions directly impact global energy markets and economic stability.
content: U.S. Vice President JD Vance said Monday that the next steps in U.S.-Iran peace efforts now depend on Tehran.

zh.title: 万斯言论提升中东和平希望，油价下跌
zh.summary: 美国副总统万斯表示伊朗掌握伊朗-美国和平努力的下一步，提升了外交解决的希望，导致油价下跌。这很重要，因为中东局势直接影响全球能源市场和经济稳定。

title: Novo Nordisk partners with OpenAI as AI drug discovery hopes mount
summary: Novo Nordisk partnered with OpenAI to leverage AI for analyzing complex datasets and identifying promising drug candidates. This collaboration reflects the growing role of artificial intelligence in pharmaceutical development and accelerating drug discovery timelines.
content: The partnership will enable Novo to better use AI to analyze complex datasets, and identify promising new drugs.

zh.title: 诺和诺德与OpenAI合作推进AI药物发现
zh.summary: 诺和诺德与OpenAI合作，利用人工智能分析复杂数据集并识别有前景的候选药物。这一合作反映了人工智能在制药开发中的作用不断增长，并加速了药物发现的时间表。

title: Streaming viewers are OK with double the commercials as ‘subscription fatigue’ sets in
summary: As streaming costs rise, consumer surveys show viewers are willing to accept increased advertising in exchange for lower subscription prices. This reflects growing demand for affordable streaming options amid rising subscription fatigue.
content: As streaming costs go up, viewers are looking for better deals — and many say they’d watch more ads for lower prices, a new survey shows.

zh.title: 随着"订阅疲劳"加剧，流媒体用户愿意接受更多广告
zh.summary: 随着流媒体成本上升，消费者调查显示用户愿意接受更多广告以换取较低的订阅价格。这反映了在日益增加的订阅疲劳中对廉价流媒体选项的需求增长。

title: European markets set to rise on hopes that Iran peace talks can resume
summary: European stock markets are expected to open higher Tuesday as investors anticipate renewed Middle East peace negotiations despite ongoing U.S. port blockade on Iran. Market optimism is driven by potential resolution of geopolitical tensions affecting global stability and energy prices.
content: European stocks are expected to open higher on Tuesday amid renewed hopes that Middle East peace talks could resume, despite a U.S. blockade on Iranian ports.

zh.title: 欧洲股市因伊朗和平谈判有望恢复而上涨
zh.summary: 欧洲股市周二预期开盘上涨，投资者期待尽管美国继续对伊朗港口实施封锁，中东和平谈判仍可能恢复。市场乐观情绪受到地缘政治紧张局势缓解的前景和全球稳定及能源价格改善的推动。

title: Founder of China's Evergrande pleads guilty to fraud
summary: Hui Ka Yan, founder of China's former real estate giant Evergrande (once valued at $50bn), pleaded guilty to fraud charges. This marks a significant development in China's real estate crisis and regulatory crackdown on corporate misconduct.
content: Evergrande was once China's biggest real estate firm, with a stock market valuation of more than $50bn.

zh.title: 中国恒大创始人认罪欺诈罪
zh.summary: 中国前房地产巨头恒大创始人许家印认罪欺诈罪。恒大曾估值500亿美元。这标志着中国房地产危机和监管部门打击企业不当行为的重大进展。

title: China exports growth in March misses estimates, imports surge most in over four years
summary: China's March export growth fell short of expectations as manufacturers faced rising energy costs exacerbated by Iran conflict disruptions, while imports surged at the fastest pace in over four years. The divergence signals strong domestic demand but fragile global supply chains.
content: China's export growth slowed in March as manufacturers grappled with surging energy costs, with the Iran war disrupting supplies, while imports jumped more than expected.

zh.title: 中国3月出口增长未达预期，进口创四年多来最大增幅
zh.summary: 中国3月出口增长未达预期，制造商面临伊朗冲突加剧导致的能源成本上升，而进口以四年多来最快的速度激增。这种差异表明国内需求强劲，但全球供应链脆弱。

title: Know when to walk away: The decision that shaped Aviva CEO Amanda Blanc
summary: Aviva Group CEO Amanda Blanc reflects on her bold decision to leave a senior executive role without a safety net and how it taught her to trust her instincts about organizational fit. Her experience illustrates the importance of recognizing when to exit situations despite career advancement.
content: At one of the highest points in her career, Amanda Blanc made a decision most executives would avoid — she walked away. In this episode of "Executive Decisions," the Aviva Group CEO reflects on leaving a senior role with no safety net, the judgment required to know when something isn’t right and how that instinct shaped the decisions she’s made since.

zh.title: 知道何时放手：塑造Aviva首席执行官阿曼达·布兰克的决定
zh.summary: Aviva集团首席执行官阿曼达·布兰克反思了她大胆的决定——在没有保障的情况下离开高管职位，以及这如何教会她相信自己的直觉和组织适应度的判断。她的经历强调了认识到何时离开岗位的重要性，即使这可能意味着放弃职业晋升。

title: Oil prices ease on hopes of new US-Iran peace talks
summary: Crude oil prices eased from above $100/barrel as new U.S.-Iran peace talks provide fresh diplomatic optimism following weekend negotiations failure. Oil market volatility demonstrates investor sensitivity to Middle East geopolitical developments.
content: Crude prices jumped above $100 on Monday after talks failed between the two sides at the weekend.

zh.title: 油价因美伊和平谈判新希望而回落
zh.summary: 由于美伊和平谈判新希望带来外交乐观情绪，原油价格从100美元/桶以上回落，这发生在周末谈判失败之后。油价波动表明投资者对中东地缘政治发展的敏感性。

title: Goldman Sachs has the top rank among the S&P 500 by this remarkable statistic
summary: Goldman Sachs consistently maintains the highest shareholder rewards among S&P 500 companies, demonstrating strong financial performance and capital allocation. This metric reflects the investment bank's sustained ability to generate shareholder value.
content: The investment bank has consistently rewarded its shareholders.

zh.title: 高盛在标普500公司中以这一卓越指标排名第一
zh.summary: 高盛在标普500公司中持续保持最高的股东回报，展现了强劲的财务表现和资本配置。这一指标反映了该投资银行持续创造股东价值的能力。

title: Man charged with attempted murder over attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
summary: A Texas man was charged with attempted murder in connection with an attack on OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home, with authorities discovering documents advocating violence against AI executives. The incident highlights escalating tensions and safety concerns surrounding AI leadership.
content: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.

zh.title: 男子因对OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼家的攻击被控谋杀未遂
zh.summary: 一名德州男子因对OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼家的攻击而被控谋杀未遂,当局发现了倡导对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。这一事件凸显了围绕人工智能领导层的紧张局势和安全问题的加剧。

title: Hollywood stars unite to oppose Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery merger
summary: Entertainment industry stars including Emma Thompson and Ben Stiller signed an open letter opposing the proposed Paramount-Warner Bros Discovery merger, despite company claims it would expand creator opportunities. The opposition reflects broader concerns about industry consolidation and creative independence.
content: Stars like Emma Thompson and Ben Stiller signed an open letter against the deal, which Paramount said will ensure creators "have more avenues for their work, not fewer".

zh.title: 好莱坞明星联合反对派拉蒙特和华纳兄弟发现公司合并
zh.summary: 包括艾玛·汤普森和本·斯蒂勒在内的娱乐业明星签署了一封公开信,反对提议的派拉蒙特-华纳兄弟发现公司合并,尽管公司声称这将扩大创作者的机会。这一反对反映了对行业整合和创意独立性的更广泛关切。

title: Asia markets open higher amid hopes of a U.S.-Iran deal; China trade data in focus
summary: Asia-Pacific markets open higher Tuesday as investors remain optimistic about potential U.S.-Iran negotiations and await China's economic data. The positive sentiment reflects cautious hope for diplomatic progress on a key geopolitical tension.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open higher Tuesday, amid positive investor sentiment that a deal between the U.S. and Iran is still possible

zh.title: 亚太市场随美伊协议希望升高；中国贸易数据成焦点
zh.summary: 亚太市场周二开盘走高，投资者对潜在美伊谈判保持乐观，等待中国经济数据。积极情绪反映了人们对这一关键地缘政治紧张局势外交进展的谨慎希望。

title: WNBA No. 1 draft pick Azzi Fudd will make $500,000 as a rookie — more than a 500% raise over last year’s pick
summary: WNBA's No. 1 draft pick Azzi Fudd will earn $500,000 in her rookie season, over 500% more than last year's top pick. The significant raise reflects the league's new labor agreement, which has created the wealthiest rookie class in WNBA history.
content: The WNBA’s latest labor agreement paved the way for the league’s wealthiest rookie class ever

zh.title: WNBA状元秀Azzi Fudd新秀赛季年薪50万美元——比去年状元高薪超500%
zh.summary: WNBA状元秀Azzi Fudd将在新秀赛季赚取50万美元，比去年状元高出500%以上。这一重大加薪反映了联盟新劳动协议，该协议创造了WNBA历史上最富有的新秀班级。
